title: KaMeRa — dependency inventory
platform_constraint: macOS-only (folder picker uses osascript; send2trash uses macOS Trash)

production.name: Pillow
production.purpose: Generic image I/O. Backbone for previews + scorer preprocessing.

production.name: pillow-heif
production.purpose: HEIF/HIF decoder. Registers a Pillow plugin so PIL.Image.open() handles .heic/.hif (Fuji X-series camera-baked previews).

production.name: opencv-contrib-python
production.purpose: Strict superset of opencv-python and opencv-python-headless. Pinning contrib gives one consistent install across mediapipe (pulls contrib) and pyiqa (pulls headless).

production.name: rawpy
production.purpose: RAF + NEF demosaicing. CANNOT decode Nikon HE* compression — pipeline falls back to extract_thumb().

production.name: mediapipe
production.purpose: FaceLandmarker (478 landmarks + blendshapes) + BlazeFace fallback. Verified compatible with Python 3.13 + macOS CPU.

production.name: pyiqa
production.purpose: TOPIQ no-reference IQA. ~100 MB weights to ~/.cache/pyiqa/. CPU-pinned (MPS adaptive_avg_pool2d incompatibility).

production.name: transformers
production.purpose: Loads CLIP-L/14 (LAION backbone) and SigLIP-base from huggingface_hub. The huggingface_hub dep is transitive.

production.name: ExifRead
production.purpose: EXIF metadata extraction (camera, lens, focal_length, aperture, shutter, ISO).

production.name: scikit-learn
production.purpose: Phase 3 personal model: SimpleImputer + StandardScaler + GradientBoostingRegressor.

production.name: openai
production.purpose: OpenAI-compatible client used to call LM Studio at localhost:1234. Optional / opt-in.

transitive_notable.name: torch
transitive_notable.purpose: Pulled by pyiqa + transformers. Used for all PyTorch inference.

transitive_notable.name: huggingface_hub
transitive_notable.purpose: Pulled by transformers. Manages weight downloads to ~/.cache/huggingface/.

transitive_notable.name: pyexiftool
transitive_notable.purpose: Used for XMP sidecar writes (UUID + rating). Required to be installed in the venv.

downloaded_on_first_use.name: LAION Aesthetic Predictor V2 linearMSE head

user_supplied.name: LM Studio vision model
user_supplied.destination: user's LM Studio install; communicated over localhost:1234 OpenAI-compat API

license_concerns.reason: AGPL is incompatible with potential future commercial use of the app. Sticking with LAION V2 linearMSE.
Both are research-trained on datasets with murky commercial licensing. Blockers if commercialised; clean for personal use.
Dynamic linkage via rawpy. Compatible with personal-use distribution; needs review if redistributed.
